headline: Coca-Cola’s Marriott Win Puts Hotel Reach And Valuation In Focus
summary: Coca-Cola has replaced Pepsi as Marriott International's global beverage provider. The multi year agreement covers nearly 9,700 hotels worldwide across Marriott's portfolio. The partnership gives Coca-Cola exposure to millions of hotel guests around the world. Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) is entering this new agreement with Marriott from a position of scale and brand recognition, supported by a broad beverage portfolio. The shares recently closed at $77.29, with a return of 11.8% year to date and...

headline: Ford seeks help with F-150, but White House won't budge
summary: The Ford F-series was the best-selling pickup truck in the United States for the 44th consecutive year in 2025, but for months, the company had been asking the government for help with a costly issue, only to be repeatedly rebuffed, according to a new report.
